reviews.author: Dinesh Tripathi
reviews.review_body:
Studies are average but hostel facilities and hostel descipline is worst not expected by such respected organisation.
Especially mess and attendents behaviour with students and as well as parents is not good.

reviews.author: shivam Baaz
reviews.review_body: Parents card not mension sunday parnets not deleverd food to children and security guard miss behavior to me

reviews.author: Rajendra Kumar
reviews.review_body: Great school for girls. Hostel is compulsory for students of class 6 to 12 students of classes 1 to 5 have to come school by their own or by buses

reviews.author: Anil Sharma
reviews.review_body: Mahamaya Balika Inter College is A Government School For Girls, Awesome Campus,Best Government School In Noida sector 44, It's Opposite To Sector-125 Amity University, Campus is good and well maintained . I went for COVID-19 vaccination so all staff are cooperating.

reviews.author: Pankaj Gautam
reviews.review_body:
Mahamaya balika inter college is not just the school where student came, study  and go out but it is more than that....
It teaches the students how to develop holistically .students of here are really very creative without the facility of internet bstudents the guidance and support of teachers.
If we talk about teachers, they are really very supportive, caring, understanding and really very knowledgeable.
Principal (Mrs.Pratiba chaudhary) is very good and fully devoted for the wellfare of students.
Its main and very attractive feature is its infrastructure it was really very fabulous. now we came at its hostel's facility it is well provided with 24 hours electricity, water five time meal a day with different recipes, first aid facility and it is fully cleaned and maintained.
It is also well guarded and its provide proper security to all the students
_A honest review by the pass out student of school
